text.title: PostTool Hook Self-Correction Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: Defer validation to a commit-time gate; don't run as PostToolUse hook.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND runtime_per_file < 5 AND language == 'python'

conclusion.verdict: Pick ruff (check + format) scoped per file.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND runtime_per_file < 5 AND language == 'typescript' or language == 'javascript'

conclusion.verdict: Pick tsc --noEmit then eslint --max-warnings 0 per file.
